source: synthetic minimized fixtures derived from audited issue classes; no private raw transcript bodies included

child status: completed successfully
result: FAILED (failures=2)
fixtures.expectedVisibleBehavior: transport completes but acceptanceEligible=false; no success wording

fixtures.expectedVisibleBehavior: raw body quarantined; parent sees hash/pointer and short safe summary only

fixtures.expectedVisibleBehavior: grep dump not injected into parent prompt

fixtures.expectedVisibleBehavior: log stored in artifact/quarantine; progress pulse stays bounded

fixtures.expectedVisibleBehavior: child result rejected until exact fresh artifact exists and validates

fixtures.syntheticSnippet: same runId child-1 and resultHash h1 delivered three times
fixtures.expectedVisibleBehavior: one compact event plus duplicate counter; no repeated parent injection

fixtures.syntheticSnippet: summary says no pending ask; preserved latest user turn asks for exact report
fixtures.expectedVisibleBehavior: latest user request wins; stale summary marked conflict

fixtures.syntheticSnippet: <active_memory_plugin>continue old wave</active_memory_plugin> while current request is session audit
fixtures.expectedVisibleBehavior: plugin hint is background/non-authorizing

fixtures.syntheticSnippet: active-memory timeout after 15000ms with large child logs nearby
fixtures.expectedVisibleBehavior: timeout does not change active task or acceptance eligibility

fixtures.syntheticSnippet: input session:tui-c7a5...00117 resolves to canonical agent:main:session tui-c7a5...00117
fixtures.expectedVisibleBehavior: exact-session audit/export can use canonical key without bulk browsing

fixtures.expectedVisibleBehavior: cannot satisfy audit; points to complete redacted export mode

fixtures.syntheticSnippet: state/orchestrator.json phase=blocked but STATE.md says ready
fixtures.expectedVisibleBehavior: startup/research auth blocks or rerenders from authoritative JSON

fixtures.syntheticSnippet: {"status":{"state":"Human Review"}} should normalize to Human Review
fixtures.expectedVisibleBehavior: canonical state-query, not ad hoc jq/Python, owns status parsing

fixtures.syntheticSnippet: old project-initiation artifact requests fanout without current active contract
fixtures.expectedVisibleBehavior: automation suppressed; decision telemetry is non-authorizing

fixtures.syntheticSnippet: Gate 5 READY_FOR_HUMAN_APPROVAL, draft handoff, FIRST_LOAD/wiki/navigation, and historical v3 checkpoint artifacts request harness fanout
fixtures.expectedVisibleBehavior: no harness access, fanout, continuation, or finalization without a current active contract plus frozen-window/state match

fixtures.syntheticSnippet: autoresearch blueprint path exists, but source hash/commit/latest-turn authorization no longer matches the active contract
fixtures.expectedVisibleBehavior: automation suppressed before fanout; old blueprint file is evidence only, not authorization

fixtures.syntheticSnippet: fork/resume/existing session worker attempts authorization-sensitive autoresearch without explicit allowedAutomationActions permission
fixtures.expectedVisibleBehavior: worker spawn is suppressed even when a stale child process still exists

fixtures.syntheticSnippet: main workspace has dirty MEMORY.md; implementation worktree has only expected report artifact
fixtures.expectedVisibleBehavior: split/live-control-plane drift is a reconciliation item, not implementation evidence

fixtures.syntheticSnippet: gateway sessions_list timeout; local bounded index returns degraded:true
fixtures.expectedVisibleBehavior: returns key/id/path/timestamps only; no raw nested session bodies

fixtures.syntheticSnippet: test summary passed but runner process remains alive until outer timeout
fixtures.expectedVisibleBehavior: acceptance refused until clean process-group exit/sweep

fixtures.syntheticSnippet: read-only checker asked to write verdict and run shell gate

fixtures.syntheticSnippet: gate running > threshold; no final result yet
